l.function: (L) Anile tikè a epi efase ekran an.

q.function: Sèlman pou Cash 3 ak Play 4. Tape jwèt la swiv pa q (Egz.: 123q) pou jenere tout konbinezon nimewo yo.

dot.function: (Pwen) sèlman pou Directo, Palé ak Tripleta. Tape jwèt la swiv pa yon pwen (Egz.: 1234.) pou jenere tout konbinezon nimewo yo.

d.function: Sèlman pou Directo. Antre yon jwèt inisyal de chif idantik swiv pa lèt d epi de chif idantik pou jwèt final la (Egz.: 33d66) pou jenere yon sekans pè idantik soti nan jwèt inisyal la rive nan jwèt final la.

minus10.function: Sèlman Pou Cash 3. Antre yon jwèt twa chif swiv pa -10 (Egz.: 123-10) pou jenere tout konbinezon ki gen de dènye chif yo, ogmante chak valè a 100.

plusXyz.function: Sèlman Pou Cash 3 Straight. Antre yon jwèt twa chif swiv pa siy + ak yon lòt jwèt twa chif (Egz.: 345+348) pou jenere yon sekans straight: 345, 346, 347.

steps: Antre yon nimewo sis chif nan jwèt la epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3Straight.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Straight
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif nan jwèt la epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3Box.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Box
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif swiv pa siy + (Egz.: 123+) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

play4Straight.title: Pou jwe Play4 Straight
steps: Antre yon nimewo kat chif swiv pa siy - (Egz.: 1234-) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

play4Box.title: Pou jwe Play4 Box
steps: Antre yon nimewo kat chif swiv pa siy + (Egz.: 1234+) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

superPale.title: Pou jwe Super Pale
steps: Antre yon nimewo kat chif nan jwèt la epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

bolita.title: Pou jwe Bolita
steps: Antre yon nimewo de chif swiv pa siy +, swiv pa ranje a (1 oswa 2) (Egz.: 12+1) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

singulacion.title: Pou jwe Singulación
steps: Antre yon nimewo yon chif swiv pa siy -, swiv pa ranje a (1, 2 oswa 3) (Egz.: 1-2) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pick5Straight.title: Pou jwe Pick5 Straight
steps: Antre yon nimewo senk chif swiv pa siy - (Egz.: 12345-) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pick5Box.title: Pou jwe Pick5 Box
steps: Antre yon nimewo senk chif swiv pa siy + (Egz.: 12345+) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pickTwo.title: Pou jwe Pick Two
steps: Antre yon nimewo de chif nan jwèt la epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3FrontStraight.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Front Straight
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif epi lèt F epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3FrontBox.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Front Box
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif epi lèt F swiv pa siy + (Egz.: 123F+) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3BackStraight.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Back Straight
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif epi lèt B epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

cash3BackBox.title: Pou jwe Cash3 Back Box
steps: Antre yon nimewo twa chif epi lèt B swiv pa siy + (Egz.: 123B+) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pickTwoFront.title: Pou jwe Pick Two Front
steps: Antre yon nimewo de chif, lèt F epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pickTwoBack.title: Pou jwe Pick Two Back
steps: Antre yon nimewo de chif, lèt B epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

pickTwoMiddle.title: Pou jwe Pick Two Middle
steps: Antre yon nimewo de chif swiv pa siy - ak ranje a (3) (Egz.: 10-3) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

panama.title: Pou jwe Panamá
steps: Antre yon nimewo kat chif swiv pa siy - (Egz.: 1234-) epi peze enter.
Antre montan an epi peze enter.

forcePassword.title: Chanjman modpas obligatwa
forcePassword.info: Modpas ou a tanporè. Pou sekirite, ou dwe etabli yon nouvo anvan ou kontinye.

password.title: Jenere modpas
password.autoClose: Fenèt sa a ap fèmen otomatikman nan 5 segonn.

changePassword.title: Chanje modpas
changePassword.pinWarning: Modpas ou a te mete ajou. Pou kontinye, ou dwe etabli yon nouvo PIN 4 chif.
changePassword.autoClose: Fenèt sa a ap fèmen otomatikman.

errors.noCurrentUser: Pa kapab jwenn itilizatè aktyèl la. Tanpri konekte ankò.

tempCredential.title: Modpas tanporè jenere
tempCredential.warning: Kominike modpas sa a ak itilizatè a. Li p ap parèt ankò. Itilizatè a dwe chanje li lè li konekte.

forceSetPin.info: Kòm itilizatè administratif, ou dwe defini yon PIN 4 chif pou konfime aksyon sansib yo.
